task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into FreeScout.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'General Inquiries' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'General Inquiries' mailbox is selected in the sidebar or displayed as the active mailbox, showing its conversation list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the correct conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation with the subject 'Printer cannot connect to network after office move' from customer Marcus Chen is opened or explicitly selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the action to move the conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Move' dropdown menu or modal is open, showing 'IT Network Support' as an available destination mailbox.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversation was successfully moved to the 'IT Network Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation 'Printer cannot connect to network after office move' is visible in the conversation list of the 'IT Network Support' mailbox, or a success notification confirms the move to this specific mailbox.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the FreeScout UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating to http://localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeScout interface appears genuine with standard layout, sidebar, and icons, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the results were achieved through normal UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools are open to manipulate the DOM, and the UI elements (like the mailbox names and conversation subjects) appear naturally rendered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The conversation subject is exactly 'Printer cannot connect to network after office move'. The source mailbox is 'General Inquiries' and the target mailbox is 'IT Network Support'. The customer associated with the ticket is Marcus Chen.
